author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Result: committed 2ec6ecd5. New file crosslink/Cross.toml (+31 lines). Pre-build directive creates /dashboard/dist/ with 0777 perms inside the cross container's filesystem so build.rs can write the dashboard placeholder there at cargo-build time, satisfying rust-embed's compile-time folder check. Surgical: only the arm64 cross target loads Cross.toml; native amd64 build is untouched. TOML validated. Pushed-by-user state: fast-forward on top of 7dd76ed3, PR #578 picks up automatically. Branch state: 4 commits ahead of develop.
